title: Baker (disambiguation)
content:
'''Baker''' can refer to one of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Bakerstown]]''', a [[city|town]] on the [[planet]] [[Vernid]].
*[[DG-1B catering droid]],  a [[cooking droid]] that's also known as a '''baker droid'''.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Baker Company (snowtrooper)|Baker Company]]''', a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Cold assault stormtrooper|snowtroopers]].
*'''[[Baker Company (stormtrooper)|Baker Company]]''', a squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].
*'''[[Baker droid/Legends|Baker droid]]''', a model of [[cooking droid/Legends|cooking droid]].
*'''[[Baker group]]''', a [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] of [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighters]]
*'''[[Baker Squadron]]''', a [[BTL-B Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-B Y-wing starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]].
*'''[[Bobolo Baker]]''', a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]].
**'''[[Bobolo Baker's All-Bith Band]]''', a [[Band/Legends|band]].
*'''[[Miagi Baker]]''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jubilar/Legends|Jubilar]].

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
===Individuals===
*'''[[Arthur Baker]]''', the calligrapher for ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces (novellas)|Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''.
*'''[[Charles Baker]]''', the actor for a [[Unidentified Mandalorian scout|Mandalorian scout]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian]]''.
*'''[[Daniel Baker]]''', an engineer for ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''.
*'''[[David W. Baker]]''', the author of "[[Sinister Plot on Quercaria]]."
*'''[[Dee Bradley Baker]]''', a voice actor for several ''[[Star Wars]]'' projects.
*'''[[Drew Baker]]''', an artist for several ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' supplements.
*'''[[Eileen Baker]]''', an actor for a [[Ewok]] and [[Ugnaught]] in {{Film|VI}}.
*'''[[Elaine Baker]]''', an actress for test shots of [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]] in ''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi''.
*'''[[Eric Baker]]''', a creative director for ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge]]''.
*'''[[Gary Baker]]''', an plasterer at [[Elstree Studios]] for ''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi''.
*'''[[Glyn Baker]]''', the actor for [[Lieutenant]] [[Endicott]].
*'''[[H. Baker]]''', an additional loader at [[Elstree Studios]] for ''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi''.
*'''[[Helen Baker]]''', a Computer Graphics Producer for ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]''.
*'''[[J. Cody Baker]]''', a colorist for {{Film|VII}}
*'''[[Jerry Baker]]''', an actor for a member of [[Scanning crew BT-445]] in {{Film|IV}}.
*'''[[John Baker]]''', SFX coordinator for ''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi''.
*'''[[Kenny Baker]]''', the actor for [[R2-D2]].
*'''[[Liza Baker]]''', the author of several childrens books based on {{Film|I}}.
*'''[[Luke Baker]]''', an actor for a running soldier in ''Star Wars: Andor''.
*'''[[Neil Baker]]''', wrote the backstory for [[Recon-PK series droid]]s.
*'''[[Rick Baker]]''', a makeup artist for ''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope''.
*'''[[Sala Baker]]''', an actor for a [[Unidentified Klatooinian raider captain|Klatooinian raider captain]] in ''Star Wars: The Mandalorian''.
*'''[[Stephen Baker]]''', the designer of [[Tarron Neb]].
*'''[[Tom Baker]]''', the voice actor for the [[Bendu]].
*'''[[Troy Baker]]''', a voice actor for ''Star Wars'' video games.

===''Star Wars Insider''===
*'''[[Baker's Batch]]''', a ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' article by [[Tara Bennett]].
*'''[[In Memoriam: Kenny Baker]]''', a ''Star Wars Insider'' article.
*'''[[Kenny Baker: The Astonishing Astromech]]''', a ''Star Wars Insider'' article.
*'''[[The Real R2-D2... Kenny Baker]]''', a ''Star Wars Insider'' article by [[Dan Madsen]].

{{Disambig}}
